zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Quincy於大約1172年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Robert de Quincy29歲，母親Basilia de Clare18歲。她於大約1190年與Philip de Prendergast結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1231年在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德恩尼斯可爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Quincy于大约1172年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Robert de Quincy29岁，母亲Basilia de Clare18岁。她于大约1190年与Philip de Prendergast结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1231年在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德恩尼斯可爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Quincy was born about 1172, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Robert de Quincy, was 29 and her mother, Basilia de Clare, was 18. She married Philip de Prendergast about 1190. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1231, in Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Ireland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Quincy est née environ 1172, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Quincy, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Basilia de Clare, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Philip de Prendergast environ 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1231, à Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlande, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Quincy um 1172 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Quincy 29 und ihre Mutter Basilia de Clare 18. Sie hat um 1190 Philip de Prendergast geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb um 1231 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Quincy è nata il circa 1172 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Quincy, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Basilia de Clare, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Philip de Prendergast circa 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1231, nel Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlanda, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Quincy(이)가 대략 1172년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Quincy(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilia de Clare(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 Philip de Prendergast(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1231년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 니스코르시에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Quincy nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Quincy, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Basilia de Clare, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip de Prendergast aproximadamente 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1231, em Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlanda, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Quincy родилась около 1172 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Quincy было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilia de Clare, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Prendergast около 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла около 1231 г. в местности эннискорти, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Philip de Prendergast aproximadamente 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1231, en Enniscorthy, County Wexford, Irlanda, a la edad de 61 años.
